# Figma Design Specification - Fas 2 RFID IoT Prototype
**Developer Handoff Document**

**Project:** RFID Manager - Fas 2 (MQTT/Sparkplug + Persistence + Barcode)  
**Platform:** Android (Kotlin + Jetpack Compose)  
**Device:** Samsung Galaxy Note 10  
**Date:** 2026-06-05  
**Status:** Ready for Implementation (Figma no longer required)

**Note (2026-06-05):** This document was generated by Figma's AI (Make environment). We have decided to bypass Figma entirely due to subscription/credit concerns. This spec, combined with our [[Nomenclature-Figma-Android]] and the three reference images, is now the authoritative UI specification. All component names, properties, and metadata fields are designed to map 1:1 to Jetpack Compose code.

---

## Table of Contents
1. [Design System](#design-system)
2. [Atomic Components](#atomic-components)
3. [Screen Specifications](#screen-specifications)
4. [Interactions & States](#interactions--states)
5. [Export Requirements](#export-requirements)

---

## Design System

### Color Palette

**Base Colors:**
- Primary #00FF88 // Neon green - actions, success, active states
- PrimaryForeground #0A0C0E // Black text on primary
- Accent #F59E0B // Amber - warnings, highlights, data preview
- Background #0A0C0E // Terminal black - base background

**Surface Colors:**
- Card #1A2A3A // Industrial navy - primary card background
- CardDark #111416 // Darker variant for nested cards
- IndustrialNavy #1A2A3A // Main surface color
- IndustrialSlate #2D3748 // Secondary surfaces, hover states

**Text Colors:**
- Foreground #E8EAED // Primary text (white)
- MutedForeground #6B7280 // Secondary text (gray)

**Status Colors:**
- StatusConnected #10B981 // Green - Sparkplug connected, transmitted
- StatusDisconnected #EF4444 // Red - disconnected, error
- StatusSending #F59E0B // Amber - sending, in-progress
- StatusWarning #F59E0B // Amber - temperature alerts, warnings

**Semantic Colors:**
- Border #374151 // Borders, dividers
- BorderAccent #3B82F6 // Blue accent borders (persisted items)

**Badge Colors:**
- BadgeRFID #10B981 // Green for RFID type badges
- BadgeEAN #3B82F6 // Blue for EAN/barcode type badges
- BadgeUID #8B5CF6 // Purple for UID type badges

### Typography

**Font Family:**
- Primary: `JetBrains Mono` (monospace - for all data, UIDs, hex, timestamps)
- Secondary: `Inter` or system sans-serif (for headings, labels)

**Text Styles:**

| Style Name | Font | Weight | Size | Line Height | Use Case |
|------------|------|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| `Heading/Large` | Inter | Bold | 24px | 32px | Screen titles |
| `Heading/Monospace` | JetBrains Mono | Medium | 16px | 20px | Section headers |
| `Body/Monospace` | JetBrains Mono | Regular | 13px | 18px | Primary text, UIDs |
| `Body/MonospaceLarge` | JetBrains Mono | Regular | 14px | 20px | Prominent UIDs |
| `Label/Monospace` | JetBrains Mono | Medium | 11px | 14px | Labels, small headers |
| `Label/MonospaceSmall` | JetBrains Mono | Regular | 10px | 14px | Timestamps, metadata |
| `Label/MonospaceXSmall` | JetBrains Mono | Regular | 9px | 12px | Type badges, tiny labels |
| `Code/JSON` | JetBrains Mono | Regular | 11px | 16px | JSON payload display |

### Spacing & Layout

**Spacing Scale:**
- --space-xs: 4px
- --space-sm: 8px
- --space-md: 12px
- --space-lg: 16px
- --space-xl: 24px
- --space-2xl: 32px

**Border Radius:**
- --radius-sm: 2px // Buttons, cards (industrial/minimal)
- --radius-md: 4px // Type badges
- --radius-lg: 8px // Large cards
- --radius-pill: 16px // Status badges (pill shape)

**Frame Dimensions:**
- Mobile: **390×844px** (modern Android, Samsung Galaxy Note 10)
- Safe area top: 40px (status bar)
- Safe area bottom: 20px (above navigation)

---

## Atomic Components

### 1. PrimaryButton

**Component Name:** `PrimaryButton`  
**Figma Properties:** `label` (text), `state` (Default/Disabled)

**Specifications:**
- **Layout:** Auto Layout, Horizontal, Hug contents
- **Padding:** 12px (top/bottom) × 24px (left/right)
- **Fill:** Primary (#00FF88)
- **Border Radius:** 2px
- **Stroke:** None

**Text:**
- Font: JetBrains Mono, Medium, 14px
- Color: PrimaryForeground (#0A0C0E)
- Letter spacing: 0.5px
- All caps: Yes (for primary actions)

**Variants:**
1. **Default:** Full opacity, fill Primary
2. **Disabled:** 50% opacity, no pointer events

**Examples from images:**
- "SCAN ESCORT ➜" (390px wide, centered)
- "Test Publish Reading" (with icon)

**Icon Handling:**
- Icons left or right of text, 16px×16px
- Spacing: 8px between icon and text

---

### 2. SecondaryButton

**Component Name:** `SecondaryButton`  
**Figma Properties:** `label` (text), `state` (Default/Disabled)

**Specifications:**
- **Layout:** Same as PrimaryButton
- **Padding:** 12px × 24px
- **Fill:** Transparent
- **Stroke:** 1px solid Border (#374151)
- **Border Radius:** 2px

**Text:**
- Font: JetBrains Mono, Medium, 13px
- Color: Foreground (#E8EAED)

**Examples:**
- "PERSIST" (with database icon)
- "View Log"
- "Details"

**Hover State:** Stroke becomes BorderAccent (#3B82F6)

---

### 3. MqttStatusBadge

**Component Name:** `MqttStatusBadge`  
**Figma Properties:** `status` (Connected/Disconnected/Sending/Live), `showDetails` (boolean)

**Specifications:**
- **Layout:** Auto Layout, Horizontal, Hug contents
- **Padding:** 8px × 16px
- **Border Radius:** 16px (pill)
- **Icon:** Circle 8px or checkmark, left-aligned, 6px margin-right

**Variants:**

#### **Connected:**
- Fill: StatusConnected (#10B981)
- Text: "SPARKPLUG CONNECTED ✓" or "● LIVE"
- Font: JetBrains Mono, Medium, 11px, white

#### **Disconnected:**
- Fill: StatusDisconnected (#EF4444)
- Text: "DISCONNECTED"
- Font: Same as above

#### **Sending:**
- Fill: StatusSending (#F59E0B)
- Text: "SENDING..."
- Font: Same, with subtle pulse animation (opacity 100% ↔ 70%, 1.5s)

**Detail Text (optional):**
- Below main badge: "Last heartbeat: 10:41:37.224 | Session: 14h 22m"
- Font: JetBrains Mono, Regular, 10px, Primary color (#00FF88)
- Spacing: 4px above

**From Image:** `fas2-mqtt-sparkplug-status.jpg` - large centered badge with heartbeat details

---

### 4. TypeBadge

**Component Name:** `TypeBadge`  
**Figma Properties:** `type` (RFID/EAN/UID)

**Specifications:**
- **Layout:** Fixed size, 40px × 20px
- **Border Radius:** 4px
- **Text:** Centered, 9px bold, white

**Variants:**

| Type | Fill Color | Text |
|------|------------|------|
| RFID | #10B981 (green) | "RFID" |
| EAN  | #3B82F6 (blue) | "EAN" |
| UID  | #8B5CF6 (purple) | "UID" |

**From Image:** `fas2-persisted-readings-list.jpg` - small pills on left of each item

---

### 5. PersistedListItem

**Component Name:** `PersistedListItem`  
**Figma Properties:** `uid`, `timestamp`, `source`, `dataPreview`, `statusVariant`, `typeVariant`, `showTransmitButton`

**Reference Image:** `fas2-persisted-readings-list.jpg`

**Specifications:**
- **Layout:** Auto Layout, Horizontal, Fill container (358px width)
- **Padding:** 16px all sides
- **Fill:** Card (#1A2A3A)
- **Stroke:** 2px solid BorderAccent (#3B82F6)
- **Border Radius:** 8px
- **Spacing between sections:** 12px

**Layout Structure:**

┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ [Icon] [Metadata Stack] [Status] [Button] │
│ 60px Flex Auto Auto │
└────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

#### **Left Section (Icon Area):**
- **Icon Container:** 60px circle
  - RFID: Orange/red gradient circle with wave icon (3 arcs radiating)
  - EAN: White/gray barcode icon (vertical lines)
- **TypeBadge:** Below icon, centered, 4px margin-top

#### **Center Section (Metadata Stack):**
Auto Layout, Vertical, spacing 4px

**Line 1 - UID/Code:**
- Text: "300833B2E1A4F7C9" or "5907789123456"
- Font: JetBrains Mono, Regular, 14px
- Color: Foreground (#E8EAED)

**Line 2 - Timestamp:**
- Text: "2024-11-18 14:37:22" (full datetime)
- Font: JetBrains Mono, Regular, 10px
- Color: MutedForeground (#6B7280)

**Line 3 - Source/Location:**
- Text: "Source: Gate 3 - Warehouse A" or "Line 7 - Palletizer"
- Font: JetBrains Mono, Regular, 10px
- Color: MutedForeground (#6B7280)

**Line 4 - Status Pill (optional):**
- Small inline badge: "✓ Persisted" (green) or "⚡ Transmitted via Sparkplug" (blue)
- Padding: 4px × 8px, radius 4px
- Font: 9px, white

#### **Right Section:**
Auto Layout, Vertical, spacing 8px, align right

**Status Indicator:** (if transmitted)
- Small pill: "Transmitted via Sparkplug"
- Fill: Accent (#F59E0B), text white, 9px

**Button:**
- SecondaryButton: "Transmit ↑" or "Details"
- Width: 80px, height: 32px

**Example Data (from images):**

1. **RFID Item:**
   - UID: `300833B2E1A4F7C9`
   - Timestamp: `2024-11-18 14:37:22`
   - Source: `Source: Gate 3 - Warehouse A`
   - Status: Green "✓ Persisted"
   - Button: "Transmit ↑"

2. **EAN Item:**
   - Code: `5907789123456`
   - Timestamp: `2024-11-18 14:29:51`
   - Source: `Source: Receiving Dock B`
   - Status: Blue "⚡ Transmitted via Sparkplug"
   - Button: "Details"

3. **UID Item:**
   - UID: `A0F9C3D7E2B8416`
   - Timestamp: `2024-11-18 13:55:09`
   - Source: `Line 7 - Palletizer`
   - Status: Green "✓ Persisted"
   - Button: "Transmit"

---

### 6. ReadingListItem

**Component Name:** `ReadingListItem`  
**Reference Image:** `fas2-main-rfid-screen.jpg` - "Recent RFID Readings" section

**Specifications:**
- **Layout:** Auto Layout, Horizontal, Fill container
- **Padding:** 12px (top/bottom) × 0 (sides)
- **Fill:** Transparent
- **Border Bottom:** 1px solid Border (#374151) with 30% opacity
- **Spacing:** 8px between elements

**Structure:**
UID • Timestamp • Status/Context

**Text Elements:**

**UID:**
- Font: JetBrains Mono, Regular, 13px
- Color: Foreground (#E8EAED)
- Example: "3004E8F92A1C"

**Bullet Separator:**
- Character: "•"
- Color: MutedForeground, 10px

**Timestamp:**
- Font: JetBrains Mono, Regular, 11px
- Color: MutedForeground (#6B7280)
- Example: "14:36:12"

**Status Icons + Text:**
Inline, spaced 6px apart

- Success: "✓ Pallet 47-B ✓ Location: Dock 3" (green)
- Warning: "⚠ Asset 112 ⚠ Temp: 4.2°C" (amber)
- Transmitted: "✓ Container XJ-19 ✓ Transmitted" (green)

**Icon Colors:**
- ✓ (checkmark): StatusConnected (#10B981)
- ⚠ (warning): StatusWarning (#F59E0B)

**Example Items (from image):**

1. `3004E8F92A1C • 14:36:12 • ✓ Pallet 47-B ✓ Location: Dock 3`
2. `A7B9C2D4E5F6 • 14:35:48 • ⚠ Asset 112 ⚠ Temp: 4.2°C`
3. `F1129A4C883D • 14:35:19 • ✓ Container XJ-19 ✓ Transmitted`
4. `9001E2F7A3B8 • 14:34:55 • ✓`

---

### 7. MqttMessageLogItem

**Component Name:** `MqttMessageLogItem`  
**Reference Image:** `fas2-mqtt-sparkplug-status.jpg` - "RECENT MQTT MESSAGES"

**Specifications:**
- **Layout:** Auto Layout, Horizontal, Fill container
- **Padding:** 12px all sides
- **Fill:** Transparent / hover: CardDark (#111416) with 30% opacity
- **Border Bottom:** 1px Border (#374151)
- **Spacing:** 12px between sections

**Structure:**
[Icon] MessageType Device/UID Timestamp [Badge] JSONPreview (truncated)

**Left Icon:**
- Size: 20px circle
- Variants:
  - Success (PUB): Green checkmark ✓, fill StatusConnected
  - Pending (SUB): Orange clock 🕐, fill StatusSending
  - Birth: Yellow star, fill #F59E0B

**Message Type:**
- Font: JetBrains Mono, Bold, 13px
- Color: Foreground (#E8EAED)
- Examples: "ReadEscortMemory", "NodeBirth", "DeviceData"

**Device/UID:**
- Font: JetBrains Mono, Regular, 11px
- Color: MutedForeground (#6B7280)
- Examples: "EdgeNode-PlantA-RFID01", "E4:9A:7C:2B:11:FF", "Status update"

**Timestamp:**
- Font: JetBrains Mono, Regular, 10px
- Color: MutedForeground
- Example: "10:41:29"

**Badge (Right):**
- Small pill, 40px × 20px, radius 4px
- Variants:
  - PUB: Fill #10B981, text "PUB" (white, 9px bold)
  - SUB: Fill #EF4444, text "SUB"
  - BIRTH: Fill #F59E0B, text "BIRTH"

**JSON Preview (Line 2):**
- Font: JetBrains Mono, Regular, 9px
- Color: MutedForeground with 60% opacity
- Text: `{"type":"ReadEscortMemory","uid":"E4:9A..."}`
- Max width: truncate with "..."

**Example Items (from image):**

1. ✓ **ReadEscortMemory** | E4:9A:7C:2B:11:FF | 10:41:29 | [PUB]  
   `{"type":"ReadEscortMemory","uid":"E4:9A..."}`

2. ⭐ **NodeBirth** | EdgeNode-PlantA-RFID01 | 10:39:12 | [BIRTH]  
   `{"type":"ReadEscortMemory","uid":"E4:9A..."}`

3. ✓ **ReadEscortMemory** | D83F:91:44:A2:7E | 10:37:05 | [PUB]  
   `{"type":"ReadEscortMemory","uid":"E4:9A..."}`

4. 🕐 **DeviceData** | Status update | 10:34:51 | [SUB]  
   `{"type":"ReadEscortMemory","uid":"E4:9A..."}`

---

### 8. RadarView

**Component Name:** `RadarView`  
**Reference Image:** `fas2-main-rfid-screen.jpg` - center element

**Specifications:**
- **Frame Size:** 280×280px (square)
- **Fill:** Radial gradient from center
  - Center: #0A0C0E (dark)
  - Edge: #1A2A3A (navy) with 40% opacity

**Concentric Circles:**
- Count: 4 circles
- Stroke: 1px solid Border (#374151) with 30% opacity
- Radii: 50px, 100px, 150px, 200px (from center)

**Sweep Line:**
- Origin: Center point
- Length: 140px (to edge)
- Stroke: Linear gradient
  - Start: Primary (#00FF88) at 100% opacity
  - End: Primary at 0% opacity
- Width: 2px
- Rotation: Animated 360° rotation, 4s duration, infinite loop

**Center Icon:**
- RFID wave icon (3 concentric arcs radiating from center chip)
- Size: 48×48px
- Color: Primary (#00FF88) with 80% opacity

**Center Text Stack:**
Auto Layout, Vertical, centered, spacing 4px

**Line 1 - Status:**
- Text: "SCAN ACTIVE" or "STANDBY"
- Font: JetBrains Mono, Bold, 18px
- Color: Primary (#00FF88) for active, MutedForeground for standby

**Line 2 - Details:**
- Text: "3.2s ago • 14 tags detected"
- Font: JetBrains Mono, Regular, 12px
- Color: MutedForeground (#6B7280)

**Below Radar - Last Read Pill:**
- Position: 8px below radar circle
- Layout: Auto Layout, horizontal, centered
- Padding: 6px × 12px
- Fill: CardDark (#111416)
- Border Radius: 4px
- Text: "Last read: 3004E8F92A1C"
- Font: JetBrains Mono, Regular, 11px, Primary color

---

### 9. LastTransmittedJsonCard

**Component Name:** `LastTransmittedJsonCard`  
**Reference Image:** `fas2-mqtt-sparkplug-status.jpg` - "LAST TRANSMITTED" section

**Specifications:**
- **Layout:** Auto Layout, Vertical
- **Padding:** 16px all sides
- **Fill:** CardDark (#111416)
- **Border Radius:** 4px
- **Stroke:** None

**Header:**
- Text: "LAST TRANSMITTED"
- Font: JetBrains Mono, Medium, 11px, MutedForeground
- Margin bottom: 12px

**JSON Content:**
- Font: JetBrains Mono, Regular, 11px
- Line height: 16px
- Syntax highlighting:
  - Keys: Accent (#F59E0B)
  - String values: Primary (#00FF88)
  - Numbers: StatusConnected (#10B981)
  - Booleans: #3B82F6
  - Punctuation: MutedForeground

**Example JSON Structure:**
```json
{
  "type": "ReadEscortMemory",
  "uid": "E4:9A:7C:2B:11:FF",
  "timestamp": "2025-02-18T10:41:29.881Z",
  "data": {
    "memoryBank": 3,
    "address": 0,
    "length": 64,
    "payload": "4D4F44454C3A45532D523132..."
  },
  "sparkplug": true
}
```

**Formatting Rules:**
- Indentation: 2 spaces per level
- Max width: 320px
- Long strings: Truncate with "..." after 30 chars

---

### 10. BottomNavigation

**Component Name:** `BottomNavigation`  
**Figma Properties:** `activeTab` (Scan/Readings/Status/History/Assets/Reports/Dashboard/Settings)

**Specifications:**
- **Layout:** Auto Layout, Horizontal, space-between
- **Width:** Fill container (390px)
- **Height:** 72px
- **Padding:** 8px (top) × 16px (sides) × 20px (bottom)
- **Fill:** CardDark (#111416)
- **Border Top:** 1px solid Border (#374151)

**Nav Item:**
- Layout: Auto Layout, Vertical, centered
- Width: Equal distribution (4 items = ~90px each)
- Spacing: 4px between icon and label

**Icon:**
- Size: 24×24px
- Active: Primary (#00FF88)
- Inactive: MutedForeground (#6B7280)

**Label:**
- Font: JetBrains Mono, Medium, 10px
- Active: Primary (#00FF88)
- Inactive: MutedForeground

**Nav Options (from images):**
- Screen 1 (Main): Scan | Readings | Assets | Reports
- Screen 2 (Persisted): Scan | Readings | Dashboard | Settings
- Screen 3 (MQTT): Scan | Status | History | Settings

**Icons:**
- Scan: Scanner/radar icon
- Readings/Status: List/database icon
- Assets: Box icon
- Reports/Dashboard: Chart icon
- History: Clock icon
- Settings: Gear icon

---

### 11. HeaderBar

**Component Name:** `HeaderBar`

**Specifications:**
- Height: 64px
- Padding: 12px × 16px
- Fill: Transparent or slight gradient (top: #0A0C0E, bottom: transparent)

**Left Section:**
- App icon: 32×32px RFID chip icon
- Title: "RFID ESCORT TRACKER"
  - Font: Inter, Bold, 20px (or 24px on main screen)
  - Color: Foreground (#E8EAED)
- Subtitle: "Site: Göteborg Terminal A"
  - Font: JetBrains Mono, Regular, 12px
  - Color: MutedForeground (#6B7280)

**Right Section:**
- MqttStatusBadge (Connected variant)
- Activity icon (pulse animation)

---

## Screen Specifications

### Screen 1: RFIDManagerScreen

**Reference Image:** fas2-main-rfid-screen.jpg

**Frame:** 390×844px  
**Background:** #0A0C0E (terminal black)

**Layout Structure:**
- Top Status Badge (Floating): "MQTT • Sparkplug B CONNECTED" + "● LIVE"
- Header: "RFID ESCORT TRACKER" + "Site: Göteborg Terminal A"
- RadarView (280×280px centered)
- Last read pill
- "Recent RFID Readings" section with 4 ReadingListItem
- Action buttons: "SCAN ESCORT", "PERSIST", "TRANSMIT TO IOT"
- Bottom Navigation + footer

**Key Metadata Fields Visible:**
- UID, Timestamp, Location, Temperature, Transmission status, Site, Scan activity counter

### Screen 2: PersistedReadingsScreen

**Reference Image:** fas2-persisted-readings-list.jpg

**Key Elements:**
- Header with count "142"
- Filter tabs: All | RFID | EAN
- List of PersistedListItem (with full metadata: UID, timestamp, Source, Status, Transmit/Details)
- Bottom nav and footer

### Screen 3: MqttStatusScreen

**Reference Image:** fas2-mqtt-sparkplug-status.jpg

**Key Elements:**
- Large "SPARKPLUG CONNECTED" badge with heartbeat/session details
- LAST TRANSMITTED full JSON card (with memoryBank, address, length, payload, sparkplug flag)
- Action buttons: Test Publish Reading, View Log
- RECENT MQTT MESSAGES log with MqttMessageLogItem (including NodeBirth, PUB/SUB, DeviceData)
- Bottom nav

---

## Interactions & States

(See the original pasted document for the full detailed interaction list — it is comprehensive and matches our needs.)

---

## Export Requirements / Handoff Notes

Since we are no longer using Figma as the primary tool:

- This document + the three reference images + our [[Nomenclature-Figma-Android]] now serve as the complete specification.
- All component names are already aligned with Android Compose (1:1).
- Metadata fields (uid, timestamp, source, memoryBank, address, length, payload, sparkplug, etc.) are explicitly defined and should be modeled in Room entities and passed through the UI.

**Next Step:** Implement directly in the Android project using this spec.

---

**End of Specification**

This is now the canonical UI reference for Fas 2. No further Figma work is required unless the user specifically wants to create visual assets for other purposes.
